On August 19, 1953, the incredibly massive, heavily orchestrated, and deeply consequential covert operation known as Operation Ajax was aggressively executed in Iran. On August 19, 1991, a massive, incredibly tense, and historically defining hardline coup attempt was aggressively launched in the Soviet Union. The massive, ultimately failed coup heavily triggered absolute, massive civil resistance in Moscow, violently accelerating the complete collapse of the Soviet empire.
